message:
fix(python): preserve node/edge attributes in graph operations

Python Bindings:
- Add py_dict_to_attr_map() helper to convert Python dicts to Rust
  HashMap<String, String> for attribute preservation
- Fix graph copy operations (copy(), to_undirected(), to_directed())
  to preserve node and edge attributes instead of silently dropping them
- Fix edge removal with None key to use last edge (auto-key selection)
  instead of failing
- Fix clear_edges() to preserve node attributes while removing edges

Algorithm:
- Fix average_node_connectivity() docstring: "non-adjacent" → "distinct"
  pairs to match actual algorithm behavior

Dependencies:
- Remove unused fnx-generators from Cargo.lock

Benchmarks:
- Minor benchmark adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
